footer.tagline: Serving the People of Junagadh with Dedication and Integrity

home.heroSlide1Subtitle: Dedicated to the progress and welfare of every citizen
home.heroSlide2Title: Rooted in Values, Built for Progress
home.missionText: Sanjay Koradia has dedicated his life to public service, championing the causes of farmers, youth, and the underprivileged. His leadership is rooted in honesty, tireless work, and a genuine connection with the people of Junagadh.

progress.subtitle: Development Across Junagadh
progress.title: Progress in Every Corner
progress.intro: Explore the work carried out across the wards and villages of the Junagadh constituency. Tap any area on the map to zoom in and see its development progress.
progress.hint: Tap an area or village number to view its progress
progress.emptyText: Click or tap any numbered area or village on the map to view the development progress there.

about.pageSubtitle: A life dedicated to public service, integrity, and the people of Junagadh
about.para1: Province, language, thinking and bringing together the interests of the whole society on gender and caste is not impossible, but very difficult to do. But the vision of Mr. Sanjaybhai Koradiya is very clear in every aspect, so that along with his colleagues, his competitors will also be affected. Let us view his personality in future horizon from his past and current achievements.
about.para2: He belongs to a hardworking farming family and grew up in a small village called Nani Vavdi. This upbringing prompted him to look closely at the smallest voices and feel one with every person's struggles — a foundation that guides his problem-solving to this day.
about.para3: Mr. Sanjaybhai grew further after his father Mr. Krishna Das shifted to Junagadh. His father worked with immense perseverance and, with the blessings of God, became the owner of a firm where he once worked. The virtues of truth-telling, hard work, timeliness, and exactness were gifted to Sanjaybhai by his father.
about.para4: He began his business journey from college days itself, developing a wide circle of mutual trust through his interpersonal skills, honesty, and market acumen. He established his first commercial venture, Vanraj Food Industries. With time, his irrepressible commitment to quality made his name a signature in the industry.
about.para5: Beyond business, he has actively helped preserve scriptural values and culture through numerous community activities. In today's political climate, colleagues who truly value ethics are rare. Sanjaybhai's services stand apart for precisely this reason.
about.timeline1Event: Born and raised in Nani Vavdi village into a farming family
about.timeline2Event: Pursued higher education; began building business connections from college days
about.timeline3Event: Founded Vanraj Food Industries — becoming a respected name in Gujarat's food industry
about.timeline4Event: Entered public service, championing the rights of farmers and the marginalised
about.timeline5Event: Elected as MLA, Junagadh — committed to development, education, and welfare
